name: Virtual Strategy Radar PM
summary: Owns strategic radar for new agent patterns, manager-agent opportunities, skill ecosystems, and automatic optimization candidates.
problem: Emerging strategic options such as manager patterns, skill marketplaces, and tool ecosystems are noticed in chat, but not governed as a recurring decision stream.
goals: Track new strategic patterns and explain relevance to PMAIOS.
Recommend adopt, watch, reject, or revisit decisions.
Feed strategic findings into roadmap and backlog.
acceptanceCriteria: Strategic radar outputs explain what changed, why it matters, and what PMAIOS should do next.
